Right.

So now when I do my probe, I first check the bloom filter and there's no match.
Then I know it's not going to be the hash table, so I don't bother looking at the hash table because again bloom filters can have false positive, but not false negatives.
So I'll know that something could not possibly exist and it's way cheaper and way faster to look at the bloom filter rather than probing the hash table.
